nodes.label: Acos
nodes.description: Compute inverse cosine; output type follows input

nodes.label: Asin
nodes.description: Compute inverse sine; output type follows input

nodes.label: Atan
nodes.description: Compute inverse tangent; output type follows input

nodes.label: Atan2
nodes.description: Compute atan2(y, x); output type inferred from inputs

nodes.label: Attribute
nodes.description: Read a named attribute with a chosen GLSL type

nodes.label: Bloom
nodes.description: Apply bloom/glare post-processing to a source pass

nodes.label: Bool Input
nodes.description: Define a constant boolean value

nodes.label: Checker Texture
nodes.description: Generate checker pattern

nodes.label: Color Input
nodes.description: Define a constant color value

nodes.label: Blend Color
nodes.description: Blend N colors using a selected blending mode (folded left-to-right)

nodes.label: Color Ramp
nodes.description: Map value to color gradient

nodes.label: Composite
nodes.description: Final composite output

nodes.label: Compute Pass
nodes.description: Defines a compute pass in the pipeline

nodes.label: Cos
nodes.description: Compute cosine; output type follows input

nodes.label: Cross Product
nodes.description: Calculate cross product of two vectors

nodes.label: Data
nodes.description: Load or edit text data with optional JSON syntax highlighting

nodes.label: Data Parse
nodes.description: Parse input data using TypeScript snippet; outputs are dynamically generated from return type

nodes.label: Dot Product
nodes.description: Calculate dot product of two vectors

nodes.label: Downsample
nodes.description: Downsample a pass using a kernel to a target size

nodes.label: Emission
nodes.description: Emissive light shader

nodes.label: File
nodes.description: Render a pass to an output file

nodes.label: Float Input
nodes.description: Define a constant float value

nodes.label: FragCoord
nodes.description: Fragment coordinates in pixels (x,y)

nodes.label: Geo Fragcoord
nodes.description: Geometry fragment coordinate (x,y)

nodes.label: Geometry From File
nodes.description: Load geometry from an external file

nodes.label: Geometry Primitive
nodes.description: Create a built-in primitive geometry

nodes.label: Geo Size
nodes.description: Geometry size (width,height) in pixels

nodes.label: Glass Material
nodes.description: Multi-pass sampled glass material (outputs material)

nodes.label: GTLF/OBJ Geometry
nodes.description: Load geometry from an uploaded glTF/glb/obj asset

nodes.label: Gradient Blur
nodes.description: Apply gradient-based blur to a source pass using a mask material

nodes.label: Gradient Texture
nodes.description: Generate gradient pattern

nodes.label: Group
nodes.description: Reusable node group instance (subgraph)

nodes.label: Gaussian Blur Pass
nodes.description: Apply a Gaussian blur to an image

nodes.label: HSV Adjust
nodes.description: Adjust hue, saturation, and value

nodes.label: Image File
nodes.description: Embed a single image file into the scene (stored as asset in archive)

nodes.label: Image Texture
nodes.description: Load and sample an image texture

nodes.label: Index
nodes.description: Instance index (0 outside zones)

nodes.label: Instanced Geometry (End)
nodes.description: End an instanced-geometry zone (finalize and output geometry)

nodes.label: Instanced Geometry (Start)
nodes.description: Start an instanced-geometry zone (outputs an instanced geometry handle)

nodes.label: Intelligent Light
nodes.description: Drives an intelligent lighting fixture with 11 color zones and a time-like driver

nodes.label: Int Input
nodes.description: Define a constant integer value

nodes.label: Kernel
nodes.description: Define a numeric kernel (width/height + row-major values)

nodes.label: Lerp
nodes.description: Linearly interpolate between A and B by T

nodes.label: Luminance
nodes.description: Compute relative luminance (0..1) from a color

nodes.label: Luminance Curve
nodes.description: Apply a cubic Bezier curve to color luminance (LAB or RGB)

nodes.label: Mat4 Input
nodes.description: Define a 4x4 matrix value

nodes.label: Matcap
nodes.description: Sample a matcap texture using view and normal vectors

nodes.label: Material From Shader
nodes.description: Convert a shader output to a renderable material

nodes.label: Material Output
nodes.description: Final material output

nodes.label: Add
nodes.description: Add two values; output type inferred from inputs

nodes.label: Clamp
nodes.description: Clamp value between min and max; output type inferred from value

nodes.label: Math Closure
nodes.description: Encapsulate a custom math expression

nodes.label: Divide
nodes.description: Divide values (dynamic inputs); output type inferred from inputs

nodes.label: Max
nodes.description: Return the larger of two values; output type inferred from inputs

nodes.label: Multiply
nodes.description: Multiply values (dynamic inputs); output type inferred from inputs

nodes.label: Power
nodes.description: Raise base to exponent; output type inferred from base

nodes.label: Subtract
nodes.description: Subtract values (dynamic inputs); output type inferred from inputs

nodes.label: Mesh Gradient
nodes.description: A 3×3 mesh gradient with 9 color control points and per-point positions

nodes.label: Mix Shader
nodes.description: Mix two shaders together

nodes.label: Noise Texture
nodes.description: Generate procedural noise

nodes.label: Normalize
nodes.description: Normalize a vector

nodes.label: Orthographic Camera
nodes.description: Build an orthographic camera matrix from transform and projection controls

nodes.label: Pass Texture
nodes.description: Sample the output texture of an upstream pass node for use in material expressions

nodes.label: PBR Material
nodes.description: Preset physically-based material (outputs material)

nodes.label: Perspective Camera
nodes.description: Build a perspective camera matrix from transform and projection controls

nodes.label: Principled BSDF
nodes.description: Physically-based rendering shader

nodes.label: 2D Rect
nodes.description: Create a 2D rectangle geometry with optional rounded corners

nodes.description: Load an image and render it as a reference overlay (not part of graph wiring)

nodes.description: Refract an incident vector about a normal using IOR (internally uses eta = 1.0 / ior)

nodes.description: Shape a scalar signal t using smoothstep, linear map, and IQ curve presets

nodes.description: Render a geometry with a material (PBR preset or shader-based)

nodes.label: Render Texture
nodes.description: Create a GPU render target texture (WebGPU GPUTextureFormat)

nodes.label: Resource Pool
nodes.description: Multi-input selector; pass through one of N connected inputs by index

nodes.label: Screen
nodes.description: Present a pass to the default screen framebuffer

nodes.label: 2D SDF
nodes.description: 2D signed distance field: circle / rectangle / smooth round rect

nodes.description: Bevel a 2D SDF (returns depth + normal)

nodes.description: Set geometry transform using either a 4x4 matrix or component controls

nodes.description: Custom shader-based material (outputs material)

nodes.description: Compute sine; output type follows input

nodes.description: Compute tangent; output type follows input

nodes.description: Load an external texture file

nodes.label: Time Input
nodes.description: Monotonic time in seconds since render/pass start

nodes.label: Transform Geometry
nodes.description: Transform geometry using either a 4x4 matrix or component controls

nodes.description: Upsample a source pass to a target size using sampler filtering

nodes.description: Define a 2D vector value

nodes.description: Perform vector operations

nodes.description: Camera view direction vector

animationNodes.description: Animation state node used in the state machine panel

animationNodes.description: Built-in entry state. Source-only transition endpoint.

animationNodes.description: Built-in exit state. Target-only transition endpoint.

animationNodes.description: Dynamic state node backed by a mutation subgraph.

innerNodes.description: Linear interpolation between A and B by T.
